projectDescription: Automated contract generation system for employees with PDF creation, Excel processing, and document management capabilities.
keyFeatures: Automated PDF contract generation for multiple contract types (Planilla, Subsidio, Part Time)
Bulk contract processing with ZIP file downloads
Excel file upload and data parsing for employee information
Excel generation for Law Life, SCTR, and photo check integrations
Contract preview with inline PDF viewing
Comprehensive data validation with Zod schemas
publicApiSurface: POST /api/contracts/download-zip - Generate and download multiple contracts as ZIP
POST /api/contracts/preview - Preview contract PDF for a single employee
POST /api/excel/upload - Upload and parse employee data from Excel
POST /api/excel/download-lawlife - Generate Law Life Excel format
POST /api/excel/download-photocheck - Generate photo check Excel format
POST /api/addendum/upload - Process Excel file for addendum generation
